metro_lines.name: Metro Line 1 (Versova-Andheri-Ghatkopar)
metro_lines.data_source: MMRDA / Mumbai Metro One Pvt Ltd (MMOPL) ridership data 2023-24

metro_lines.name: Metro Line 2A (Dahisar-DN Nagar)
metro_lines.data_source: MMRDA Metro Line 2A ridership data 2023-24, post-January 2024 opening ramp-up

metro_lines.name: Metro Line 7 (Dahisar E-Andheri E)
metro_lines.data_source: MMRDA Metro Line 7 ridership data 2023-24, post-opening ramp-up

lines.name: Western Line
lines.data_source: Western Railway Mumbai Division ridership data 2023-24

lines.name: Central Line
lines.data_source: Central Railway Mumbai Division ridership data 2023-24

lines.name: Harbour Line
lines.data_source: Central Railway Harbour line ridership data 2023-24

suburban_rail.data_source: Combined Western + Central + Harbour suburban rail ridership; Mumbai suburban rail is the single largest mass transit system in India

bus_network.data_source: BEST Undertaking annual data 2023-24; ridership recovered post-COVID with fare reduction strategy under Lokesh Chandra

transport_network.total_daily_pt_ridership_data_source: Sum of metro (0.565M) + suburban rail (7.55M) + bus (2.8M); Mumbai has highest PT ridership of any Indian city

economic_baseline.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO PLFS 2022-23 Mumbai urban MPCE data scaled to household level; Gini from NSSO consumption expenditure distribution (highest inequality among 6 cities due to Dharavi-SoBo contrast); formal employment from EPFO enrollment vs total workforce; sectors from Maharashtra Economic Survey 2023-24

validation_anchors_note: To be populated post-Mumbai hindcast calibration run
